process.name: Example Widget Creation
process.documentation:
Example BPMN process demonstrating DispatchAxonCommandTask usage.
Required process variables: - widgetId (String): UUID for widget aggregate identifier - tenantId (String): Tenant identifier for multi-tenancy isolation - name (String): Widget name - description (String, optional): Widget description - value (BigDecimal): Widget value - category (String): Widget category

serviceTask.name: Create Widget via Axon
serviceTask.documentation: Dispatches CreateWidgetCommand to Axon CommandGateway. Uses delegateExpression to enable Spring bean injection (CommandGateway, TenantContext). Uses process variables to build the command.
